title: BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
shortInfo: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks and NET/M.Phil/Ph.D.
qualification.details: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D.

selection_process: experiences and project requirements Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Assistant position at BITS Pilani is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a postgraduate degree in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks and possess NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position at BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email with all required documents attached, before the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, experience, and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. What is the notification date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for this recruitment was released on 19th May 2026.
